automotive-workflow.name: Automotive Workflow
automotive-workflow.description: Premium automotive detailing business layout and conversion path.
automotive-workflow.markdown:
# Automotive Workflow

Automotive detailing studio, ceramic coating, and PPF service workflow.

## Sequence
`codebase-recon → automotive-ux → design-system-extractor → content-hierarchy → designer-mobile → media-fit-specialist → ux-conversion-strategist → seo-local-search → visual-qa-agent → deployment-verifier`

## Primary Focus
- Establish high-end craftsmanship without generic styling
- Build strong WhatsApp and booking conversion paths
- Structure package comparisons clearly
- Verify image fitting of portrait and landscape project cards
- Enable local SEO and search snippets

cinematic-motion.name: Cinematic Motion
cinematic-motion.description: Creates a unified motion system and scroll experiences.
cinematic-motion.markdown:
# Cinematic Motion Workflow

Creates a unified motion system and scroll experiences.

## Sequence
`design-me → motion-architect → scroll-systems-engineer → performance-optimizer → designer-mobile → visual-qa-agent → interaction-qa-agent`

## Primary Focus
- Establish a single, consistent motion language across sections
- Separate time-based and scroll-based motion
- Measure real viewport heights and track scroll triggers
- Maintain performance budget, optimizing WebGL or blur
- Capture start, middle, and end scroll-state screenshots

full-website-audit.name: Full Website Audit
full-website-audit.description: Comprehensive audit, redesign, testing, and production verification.
full-website-audit.markdown:
# Full Website Audit Workflow

Comprehensive audit, redesign, testing, and production verification.

## Sequence
`codebase-recon → design-system-extractor → ux-conversion-strategist → content-hierarchy → designer-mobile → motion-architect → scroll-systems-engineer → accessibility-auditor → performance-optimizer → visual-qa-agent → interaction-qa-agent → deployment-verifier`

## Primary Focus
- Map codebase and extract design system rules
- Rationalize content placement and conversion goals
- Reconstruct layout for mobile breakpoints
- Implement coherent motion and scroll interactions
- Execute full accessibility audit and performance tuning
- Perform visual and interaction QA, and verify production deployment

healthcare-workflow.name: Healthcare Workflow
healthcare-workflow.description: Hospital and clinic website organization, accessibility, and CMS preservation.
healthcare-workflow.markdown:
# Healthcare Workflow

Hospital and clinic website design, accessibility, and content hierarchy workflow.

## Sequence
`codebase-recon → healthcare-ux → content-hierarchy → accessibility-auditor → backend-admin-preserver → designer-mobile → interaction-qa-agent → seo-local-search → deployment-verifier`

## Primary Focus
- Quick mobile access to Emergency calling and Ambulance
- Visible OPD timings and department listings
- Assistive technology and keyboard navigation checks
- Protecting editability of operational content in the CMS
- Verification of sitemap, metadata, and local search presence

mobile-reconstruction.name: Mobile Reconstruction
mobile-reconstruction.description: Rebuilds desktop experiences for mobile screens and touch inputs.
mobile-reconstruction.markdown:
# Mobile Reconstruction Workflow

Rebuilds desktop experiences for mobile screens and touch inputs.

## Sequence
`codebase-recon → designer-mobile → typography-director → media-fit-specialist → scroll-systems-engineer → visual-qa-agent → interaction-qa-agent`

## Primary Focus
- Adapt desktop compositions for mobile without cropping essential behavior
- Set fluid typography scales and spacing parameters
- Fix safe-area and fixed-control collisions
- Build mobile-specific, lightweight animation timelines
- Test touch interactions, reverse scroll, and orientation changes

portfolio-workflow.name: Portfolio Workflow
portfolio-workflow.description: Optimizes editorial developer portfolios for positioning and credentials.
portfolio-workflow.markdown:
# Portfolio Workflow

Editorial developer and creative professional portfolio workflow.

## Sequence
`codebase-recon → portfolio-ux → design-system-extractor → typography-director → motion-architect → scroll-systems-engineer → route-transition-designer → designer-mobile → media-fit-specialist → visual-qa-agent → interaction-qa-agent → deployment-verifier`

## Primary Focus
- Clean, focused professional positioning
- Seamless typography and spacing system
- Coherent cinematic motion language (entrance reveals, scroll control)
- Responsive mobile adaptation (Recent Work touch carousel)
- Shared element route morphing transitions

release-gate.name: Release Gate
release-gate.description: Validates visual regression, interaction, SEO, and production deployment.
release-gate.markdown:
# Release Gate Workflow

Validates visual regression, interaction, SEO, and production deployment before final delivery.

## Sequence
`accessibility-auditor → performance-optimizer → visual-qa-agent → interaction-qa-agent → seo-local-search → deployment-verifier`

## Primary Focus
- Verify keyboard layout, semantic HTML, and text contrast
- Check loading performance and asset budgets
- Validate visual layout across all breakpoints (1440px down to 390px)
- Perform full interaction gesture test
- Verify sitemaps, robots.txt, metadata, and production deployment aliases

route-transition.name: Route Transition
route-transition.description: Premium page switching rooted in a real interface element.
route-transition.markdown:
# Route Transition Workflow

Premium route transition implementation workflow.

## Sequence
`codebase-recon → route-transition-designer → motion-architect → interaction-qa-agent → accessibility-auditor → deployment-verifier`

## Primary Focus
- Establish route transitions rooted in real shared interface elements
- Cover the page swap cleanly without visual jumps
- Maintain persistent global navigation header/footer shell
- Verify touch targets and keyboard focus trap/restoration after route transitions
- Verify page back/forward actions
